name: Gap and Go
trigger: gaps up on a catalyst and holds above the prior close and premarket high
entry: buy the opening-range-high reclaim that holds VWAP
taboo: enter in risk-off or on the backside

name: First Red Day
trigger: a multi-day runner prints its first lower close after a green streak
taboo: buy the first red day of an extended runner

name: Parabolic Blowoff
trigger: exhaustion gap + climactic volume + large upper wick at the highs
exit_stop: sell into the blowoff / never chase it

name: Dilution Pump
trigger: low-float runner with ATM/shelf history spiking on a weak catalyst
exit_stop: fade / do not hold into an offering

name: Reverse-Split Pump
trigger: post-reverse-split low-float spike with no real catalyst

name: Base Breakout
trigger: breaks a flat/cup base pivot on expanding volume with relative strength
exit_stop: below the base / undercut of the pivot
taboo: buy a breakout in a market downtrend

name: Pullback to Moving Average
trigger: a leader pulls back to the rising 10/20 EMA and holds with a reclaim
entry: buy the reclaim of the MA
taboo: catch a knife below a broken MA

name: Failed Breakout
trigger: a breakout undercuts the pivot and closes back inside the base
taboo: hold a failed breakout hoping it recovers

name: Distribution Day Cluster
trigger: a cluster of high-volume down days in the leaders / index
taboo: add risk into a distribution cluster

name: Earnings Gap Continuation
trigger: a beat-and-raise earnings gap that holds the gap and the opening range
entry: buy the gap-and-hold above the opening range
taboo: chase a gap that is already fading

name: Sell the News
trigger: good news but the stock closes red / fails to hold the pop
exit_stop: do not chase into the news; fade strength
taboo: buy the anticipated catalyst at the top

name: FDA Binary Risk
trigger: an upcoming binary catalyst (PDUFA/data) on a biotech
exit_stop: size for total loss or avoid; no naked overnight hold
taboo: hold a biotech binary naked over the event

name: Short Squeeze
trigger: high short interest + catalyst + tape strength reclaiming key levels
exit_stop: exit on squeeze exhaustion / loss of the reclaim

name: Gamma Squeeze
trigger: heavy near-the-money call buying forcing dealer hedging
entry: buy strength while gamma is positive
exit_stop: exit when the options flow reverses

name: Squeeze Exhaustion
trigger: a parabolic squeeze with climactic volume and a failed new high
exit_stop: do not chase; the squeeze is ending

name: Social Euphoria Top
trigger: peak social-sentiment + parabolic price = late-stage distribution
